name: logo
prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: repository logo
Primary request: Create a clean vector-friendly logo mark for an unofficial Chinese-first best-practice knowledge base about workplace AI agents and enterprise office automation.
Subject: abstract friendly office agent formed by a document page, workflow nodes, and a subtle check mark; not a robot mascot.
Style/medium: modern flat geometric logo, crisp edges, simple shapes, high contrast, usable as GitHub avatar.
Composition/framing: centered square icon with generous padding.
Color palette: deep blue, teal, warm off-white, small amber accent.
Constraints: no text, no letters, no trademarks, do not imitate WorkBuddy, Tencent, CodeBuddy, OpenAI, Claude, or GitHub logos, no watermark.

name: readme-hero
prompt:
Use case: productivity-visual
Asset type: README hero illustration
Primary request: Create a polished editorial illustration for a GitHub README about turning workplace prompts into agentic office automation workflows.
Scene/background: clean enterprise workspace with floating documents, spreadsheet grid, presentation slides, calendar card, and connected workflow nodes.
Subject: a calm abstract AI office assistant coordinating Task Brief, Context Package, Review, and Automation concepts visually without readable text.
Style/medium: modern 2.5D vector-like illustration, soft gradients, professional but not marketing-heavy.
Composition/framing: wide landscape, central flow from left rough idea sticky note to right checked deliverables, enough whitespace at top.
Color palette: deep navy, cyan, teal, white, subtle amber highlights.
Constraints: no readable text, no real product UI, no brand logos, no trademarks, no watermark, avoid overly futuristic sci-fi.

name: context-package
prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: conceptual illustration for .workbuddy project-level context folder
Primary request: Create a visual metaphor for a project-level context folder used with WorkBuddy-oriented workflows.
Scene/background: minimal knowledge-base workspace with one highlighted folder containing stable project context assets.
Subject: folder connected to task brief card, writing rules card, prompt template card, workflow loop, review checklist, and security shield; these should be represented with icons and abstract blocks, not readable labels.
Style/medium: flat infographic illustration, clean vector-like shapes, enterprise documentation aesthetic.
Composition/framing: three-layer relationship: team task materials feeding into context folder, then into manual run/review/workflow pipeline; show boundaries with subtle dashed lines.
Color palette: blue, teal, off-white, gray, amber warning accent.
Constraints: no readable text except simple non-language marks, no official logo imitation, no watermark, make it clear this is a practice convention not an official product feature through a neutral caution/shield visual.

name: logo-v2
prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: unofficial community repository logo, square GitHub avatar
Primary request: Create a clean vector-friendly logo mark for an unofficial Chinese-first WorkBuddy best-practice knowledge base, visually adjacent to the official WorkBuddy / CodeBuddy ecosystem but clearly original.
Official visual reference to reinterpret, not copy: rounded purple gradient product tile, subtle teal glow accents, white abstract agent/execution glyph, polished enterprise AI desktop style.
Subject: an original community practice mark: a rounded square app tile containing a white abstract workflow-ribbon glyph that combines a document corner, connected task nodes, and a small verification/check path. The glyph should feel like workplace Agent execution and reusable practice methods, not a mascot.
Style/medium: modern flat geometric logo, vector-like, crisp edges, premium product icon, simple enough for GitHub avatar.
Composition/framing: centered square icon, generous padding, no surrounding text.
Color palette: primary violet-to-indigo gradient inspired by product UI, teal glow accent, white glyph, tiny cyan highlight. Avoid deep navy dominance.
Constraints: no readable text, no letters, no Tencent/CodeBuddy/WorkBuddy official logo, do not reproduce the official rocket/chain-like emblem, do not imply official endorsement, no watermark, no brand names.

name: readme-hero-v2
prompt:
Use case: productivity-visual
Asset type: README hero illustration for an unofficial WorkBuddy practice repository
Primary request: Create a polished wide hero image for a Chinese-first community best-practice knowledge base around WorkBuddy-style workplace agents and enterprise office automation.
Official visual reference to reinterpret, not copy: clean documentation product UI, white work surface, violet-to-indigo product tiles, teal glow accents, rounded panels, a professional AI desktop/workbench feeling.
Scene/backdrop: bright enterprise desktop workbench with a central abstract agent execution tile, surrounded by practical office artifacts: task brief card, spreadsheet grid, presentation slide, calendar, checklist, connector nodes, automation loop, and a context package folder. Use abstract icon blocks instead of readable labels.
Subject: a central original violet rounded square tile with a white abstract workflow/document glyph, connected to office deliverables and review checkpoints. It should communicate: one-sentence task -> context package -> manual run -> result review -> reusable workflow -> automation.
Style/medium: modern 2.5D vector-like product illustration, clean, sharp, official-doc-adjacent, community tutorial aesthetic, not sci-fi.
Composition/framing: 1536x1024 landscape, hero-safe with clear center, generous top whitespace for README cropping, balanced left-to-right workflow.
Color palette: white and light gray base, violet/indigo primary, teal/cyan glow accents, small amber caution accents. Avoid dark navy dominance.
Constraints: no readable text, no real product UI screenshots, no Tencent/CodeBuddy/WorkBuddy official logo, do not reproduce the official emblem, do not imply official endorsement, no watermark, no brand names.

name: mascot-logo
prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: repository logo for an unofficial WorkBuddy community best-practice repository
Input images: the user-provided official WorkBuddy mascot group image and the teal/black cat-head mark are visual references.
Primary request: Completely replace the previous document/checkmark design direction. Create a new logo centered on the WorkBuddy-inspired cat-eared AI office buddy motif, suitable for GitHub avatar and README branding.
Subject: an original cat-eared AI assistant head icon with a glossy black visor, two calm vertical cyan-green eyes, small headset/workbench details, and a subtle practice/knowledge-base cue such as a tiny notebook tab or checklist chip integrated into the silhouette. Use the teal square + black cat-ear silhouette reference as the strongest shape inspiration, but make a polished original community derivative rather than a copy.
Style/medium: premium 3D app icon, crisp and simple, high contrast, mascot-like but professional, enterprise AI assistant identity.
Composition/framing: square 1024x1024 icon, centered mascot head, generous padding, readable at small sizes.
Color palette: teal/turquoise base, black visor, white/silver shell accents, cyan-green glow, small violet accent from the multi-agent reference.
Constraints: no readable text, no official wordmark, no Tencent/CodeBuddy/WorkBuddy text, no exact tracing of the provided official logo, no watermark, do not imply official endorsement.

name: readme-hero-mascot
prompt:
Use case: productivity-visual
Asset type: README hero illustration for an unofficial WorkBuddy best-practice repository
Input images: the user-provided official WorkBuddy multi-cat-agent image and teal/black cat-head mark are visual references.
Primary request: Completely replace the previous bright document/workflow hero. Design a new README hero built around a team of cat-eared AI office buddies doing enterprise work, directly inspired by the official mascot universe but as an original community tutorial illustration.
Scene/backdrop: dark premium desktop/workbench scene with soft neon glows and floating office panels. A central cat-eared AI buddy coordinates a laptop from a circular platform; around it are smaller specialist buddies representing operations, strategy, product/project management, data analysis, and development. Show documents, spreadsheets, charts, code panels, checklist boards, connector lines, and automation loops as visual artifacts.
Subject: multi-agent office automation team, cat ears, glossy black face visors, cyan/green glowing eyes, white/silver robot bodies, subtle role-specific props. The mood should say: WorkBuddy community practice, reusable workflows, enterprise Agent methods.
Style/medium: polished 3D mascot illustration, cinematic black background, neon teal/cyan/violet/amber accents, high-detail but clean, suitable for README top image.
Composition/framing: 1536x1024 landscape, central mascot cluster with enough breathing room, readable at README width, no cropped faces.
Color palette: black background, white/silver robots, teal/cyan glow, violet PM accents, amber strategy accents, small blue data/dev accents.
Constraints: no readable text, no exact copy of the provided official image layout, no official wordmark, no Tencent/CodeBuddy/WorkBuddy text, no watermark, do not imply official endorsement.

name: workflow-mascot
prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: README section illustration for reusable WorkBuddy practice workflow
Input images: the user-provided official WorkBuddy mascot group image and teal/black cat-head mark are visual references.
Primary request: Create a supporting README illustration that explains the repository method using the cat-eared WorkBuddy-inspired mascot universe, replacing the old folder diagram direction.
Scene/backdrop: clean dark-to-teal workspace with one central cat-eared AI buddy assembling a reusable practice kit. Around it are six visual modules: task brief, context package, manual run, result review, workflow template, automation. Use icons and abstract cards, not readable text.
Subject: a cat-eared AI assistant with black visor and cyan-green eyes, holding a glowing context package folder; connector lines link the six modules into a reusable loop. Include small security shield and permission lock motifs to reflect enterprise safety.
Style/medium: polished 3D + infographic hybrid, mascot-led technical diagram, neon teal/cyan/violet accents on a dark background, clean enough for documentation.
Composition/framing: 1536x1024 landscape, central mascot and folder, six modules arranged in an arc/loop, enough spacing for README readability.
Color palette: black/charcoal background, teal/cyan glow, white/silver mascot, violet secondary accents, amber safety accent.
Constraints: no readable text, no exact copy of the provided official image layout, no official wordmark, no Tencent/CodeBuddy/WorkBuddy text, no watermark, do not imply official endorsement.
